events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Zuckerberg San Francisco General for client 1014. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic. Allergies: sesame. Sodium ceiling 800 mg/meal, carbs 40–55 g/meal. Prefers Filipino; dislikes beef. Cooking ability: stovetop. 5 meals/week, zone Chinatown.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Arroz Caldo
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 57 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Pancit Bihon
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 63 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Matched: Low-Sodium Chicken Adobo with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 426/800 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 40–55) ✓, no sesame ✓.

events.title: Matched: Baked Bangus with Garlic Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 396/800 mg ✓, carbs 47 g (target 40–55) ✓, no sesame ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/800 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 40–55) ✓, no sesame ✓.

events.title: Pickup scheduled
events.detail: Meals for client 1014 ready for pickup 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00 (Chinatown group). Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1014: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
